latest_news.headline: Trump says US considering 'winding down' Iran war
latest_news.text: Trump posts US considering 'winding down' the war — contradicting earlier no-ceasefire stance. Major de-escalation signal.

latest_news.headline: US eases sanctions on Iranian oil at sea
latest_news.text: US Treasury authorizes purchase of ~140M barrels Iranian oil already at sea. Bessent: bringing 400M+ barrels to market since war start.

latest_news.headline: Khamenei Nowruz: 'Enemies of Islamic Republic being defeated'
latest_news.text: Khamenei written Nowruz message: enemies being defeated due to national unity. Pezeshkian reiterates no nuclear weapons pursuit.

latest_news.headline: UK warns Iran: targeting UK bases = aggression
latest_news.text: UK FM Cooper warns Iran against targeting UK territory. Iran FM Araghchi told Cooper that US use of British bases would be participation in aggression.

latest_news.headline: Iran humanitarian toll: 1,400+ killed, 18,000+ injured, 204 children dead
latest_news.text: Iranian Red Crescent reports 18,000+ civilian injuries, 204 children killed, 1,400+ total killed since war began Feb 28.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: NEW: Israel strikes Sweida province Syria (Druze protection). Saudi + Turkey condemn. Potential new tracker trigger - monitoring.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 78% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 21 auto - IMMINENT. Ground ops continuing. No new developments. Updated 2026-03-21T03:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah destroys 6 Israeli Merkava tanks in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Hezbollah claims destruction of 6 Israeli Merkava tanks during attempted advance into Taybeh towards Deir Siryan area. Stiff ground resistance slowing Israeli advance.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes kill 10 in central Beirut, hospital ICU damaged
latest_news.text: At least 10 killed in central Beirut airstrike. Hospital ICU damaged in Nabatieh. Wide-scale shelling of southern Lebanon towns. 1M+ displaced.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 21 auto - DETERRENT. No new developments. Updated 2026-03-21T03:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: Kremlin confirms Ukraine peace talks on pause - 'situational' due to Iran war
latest_news.text: Kremlin says pause in Ukraine peace talks is 'situational' due to Iran conflict consuming US bandwidth. Kyiv says new meeting planned. Zelensky sends negotiating team to US for Saturday talks despite pause.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard tells Senate: Russia 'maintains upper hand' in Ukraine war
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard testifies Russia 'maintained the upper hand' in Ukraine war. Moscow likely to continue war of attrition until agreement reached. Putin says open to peace but actions contradict.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 21 Hour 01. DE-ESCALATION: Trump 'winding down'. US eases oil sanctions. Netanyahu halts energy strikes. Pezeshkian: no nukes. ESCALATION: More Marines deployed. Iran 'zero restraint'. Khamenei defiant. Gulf attacks continue. UK-Iran tensions. 1,400+ dead. MIXED — rhetoric vs posture contradiction.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes regime targets in Tehran - fresh retaliatory strikes early Sat
latest_news.text: Israel launches fresh strikes on regime targets in Tehran after Iran fires new wave of missiles at Israel. IDF also strikes Beirut. Continued tit-for-tat despite winding down rhetoric.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Syrian army camps in Sweida - Saudi Arabia and Turkey condemn as aggression
latest_news.text: IDF strikes southern Syria citing attacks on Druze community. Saudi FM condemns blatant Israeli aggression. Turkey calls it dangerous escalation. Syria denounces outrageous assault on sovereignty. New front opening alongside Iran war.

latest_news.headline: Iran launches new drone/missile barrage on Saudi Arabia and Israel after Khamenei dizzying blow claim
latest_news.text: Iran launches fresh wave of attacks on Saudi Arabia and Israel. Khamenei claims dizzying blow to enemies. Continued Gulf bombardment despite US winding down signals.

latest_news.headline: White House: 4-6 week mission timeline for Iran objectives
latest_news.text: Press Sec Leavitt: President and Pentagon predicted 4-6 weeks to achieve mission objectives. Sets expectation for continued operations despite winding down rhetoric.

latest_news.headline: Hormuz closed Day 21 - no commercial traffic
latest_news.text: Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed to most shipping on Day 21. One fifth of global oil and LNG transits through this chokepoint.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21, 03:04 UTC) — IMMINENT: Iran war Day 21. Trump 'winding down' but refuses ceasefire. Israel strikes Tehran again. Hormuz closed 21 days. US eases oil sanctions. Eid ceasefire PAK-AFG holding through Mar 23. No material changes from Hour 02. Updated 2026-03-21T03:04:00Z
